title: SpartanBot
description: a bot using carpet mod to make the ultimate spear pvp practice that looks like real players
body:
SpartanBot

SpartanBot is an advanced AI combat mod for Minecraft that spawns intelligent bots capable of realistic PvP combat — with four difficulty levels ranging from beginner-friendly to absolutely ruthless.

Built specifically for snapshot 25w43a with the new spear mechanics, SpartanBot creates challenging opponents that fly, strafe, dodge, and execute complex attack patterns just like real players. Perfect for training, testing your skills, or just having epic battles when your friends aren't online.

It's server-side, integrates with Carpet mod for bot spawning, and optionally uses Gemini AI for even smarter decision-making.
Features

Intelligent Combat AI: Bots that actually fight like players with realistic movement, timing, and tactics.

Four Difficulty Levels:

    EASY: 50% accuracy, slow reactions, predictable movement
    NORMAL: 75% accuracy, basic tactics, medium speed
    HARD: 90% accuracy, uses potions, real-time tracking
    INSANE: 98% accuracy, pro-level tactics, perfect tracking

Spear PvP Mastery:

    Bots utilize the new spear mechanics from 25w43a
    Aerial lunge attacks with elytra
    Calculated charge timing and distance management
    Dynamic strength potion usage for maximum damage

Full PvP Kit System:

    Auto-equips bots with netherite armor and weapons
    Includes spears, totems, potions, elytra, and more
    /kit command to get the same loadout yourself
    Rekit functionality to refresh bot resources

Optional AI Integration:

    Gemini AI support for advanced decision-making
    Fallback to rule-based AI when offline
    Configurable tactics and behavior parameters

Simple Commands:

    /bot spawn [difficulty] - Spawn a combat bot
    /bot remove - Remove all bots
    /bot status - Check active bots
    /kit - Get the official PvP kit

Configuration

SpartanBot creates a config file at config/spartanbot/config.json with options for:

    Gemini API key (optional)
    Combat ranges and thresholds
    Tactical parameters
    Logging preferences

Dependencies

Required:

    Fabric API
    Carpet Mod (for bot spawning)

Optional:

    Gemini API key (for enhanced AI)

Who is SpartanBot for?

    PvP Players wanting to practice against intelligent opponents
    Content Creators needing dynamic combat scenarios
    Server Admins looking to add challenging PvE content
    Speedrunners practicing combat techniques
    Anyone who wants to test their skills against adaptive AI

Technical Notes

    Server-side mod (all players can see the bots)
    Optimized for snapshot 25w43a spear mechanics
    Lightweight with async AI processing
    Compatible with vanilla clients

Credits

    Sparta – Mod author and developer
    Gemini AI – Optional intelligence backend
    Carpet Mod Team – Bot spawning framework
    FabricMC – Modding platform

License
